  "findings": [
    "Trip hazards from cords routed across active walkways",
    "Fall hazards due to missing guardrails on elevated work areas",
    "Blocked egress routes and obstructed fire extinguishers",
    "Fall and collapse hazards from improvised, non-compliant scaffolding",
    "Unattended and unguarded open floor holes"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately to address life-safety hazards",
    "Reroute or cover cords crossing walkways to eliminate trip hazards",
    "Install compliant guardrails or personal fall arrest systems on elevated platforms",
    "Clear all blocked egress paths and ensure fire extinguishers are fully accessible",
    "Dismantle improvised scaffolds and replace with engineered, compliant scaffolding",
    "Cover and secure all open floor holes with clearly marked, load-bearing covers"
  ],
  "rationale": "The jobsite exhibits multiple critical safety violations including improvised scaffolding, unguarded floor openings, blocked egress, and severe trip hazards. These conditions violate OSHA standards and present an immediate danger to life and health, requiring an immediate stop-work order and corrective action.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA General Duty Clause Section 5(a)(1)",
    "29 CFR 1926 Subpart L (Scaffolds)",
    "29 CFR 1926.501 (Duty to have fall protection)",
    "29 CFR 1926.25 (Housekeeping)",
    "29 CFR 1926.34 (Means of egress)"
  ]
}
